title: Hinkley Point C New Nuclear Power Station: post-consent approval request, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by NNB Generation Company Limited to approve the request to extend the timescale for removal of the temporary jetty as part of the Hinkley Point C New Nuclear Power Station.  Date of decision  3 December 2025  Company / location   NNB Generation Company LimitedHinkley Point, Somerset   Type of project  Post-consent approval request under The Hinkley Point C (Nuclear Generating Station) Order 2013, as made under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  N/A "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
